title: Beta 1.7.3 Music Discs
description: Adds modern Music Discs into Beta 1.7.3
body:
# Beta 1.7.3 Music Discs

A mod for that adds the modern Music Discs into Beta 1.7.3.

## Help! The Music Discs arent playing!
Due to Modrinth's policy on distributing music, the Jars posted here do not include the music files. This *shouldnt* cause issues, as the music is downloaded from mojangs servers and are in the game, even in Beta 1.7.3, but it is unrelaible and finnicky, so it is easier to just include the audio files in releses on github for people experincing bugs with music not playing.

[Github Link](https://github.com/Jadestrouble/b1.7.3-MusicDiscs/releases/)

## Additions 

### C418 Discs
- Blocks
- Chirp
- Far
- Mall 
- Mellohi
- Stal
- Strad
- Ward
- 11
- Wait

### Lena Raine Discs
- Pigstep
- Otherside

## Obtaining

All Discs besides Pigstep can be found in Dungeon Chests or drop when a Creeper is killed by a skeleton.


## Compatibility
Requires [StationAPI 2.0-alpha.1.1](https://modrinth.com/mod/stationapi/version/2.0-alpha.1.1)

Can be configured with [Glass Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/glass-config-api/version/2.0.2) and [Mod Menu Beta](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu-beta)

Has a tab in [Beta Horizons Creative](https://modrinth.com/mod/bh-creative/version/0.4.5)
